name: TapTap DC
description: Raw TapTap DC tools for OpenClaw, bundled with an ops brief skill.

workspaceRoot.description: Optional workspace root passed to the embedded TapTap runtime.

cacheDir.description: Optional cache directory override for the embedded TapTap runtime.

tempDir.description: Optional temp directory override for the embedded TapTap runtime.

logRoot.description: Optional log directory override for the embedded TapTap runtime.

verbose.description: Enable verbose logging for the embedded TapTap runtime.
